stemHtml: During landing, the pilot flares using a 5° pitch-up technique, intending to utilise ground effect to touchdown softly. Which of the following statements is most correct?

options.a: This is an inappropriate technique for all aircraft, as it may stall during the pull-up manoeuvre.
options.b: This is an inappropriate technique for this aircraft and may lead to a tailstrike or hard landing.
options.c: This is an appropriate technique for all aircraft to touch down, but it increases the landing distance.
options.d: This technique is only appropriate for this aircraft as long as the critical angle of attack is not exceeded in ground effect.
